title: A Young Team’s Plan
article_text: We have a new young team. Their first job is to build a small service area. They hold a meeting to make a plan. For example, they want to increase the service for local people. The result of their work is a big success. However, one fact is against their idea at first. They believe in their plan though. Yes, they love their work. The close team offers a second program. This happens away from the city area.

sentences.en: We have a new young team.
sentences.zh: 我们有一个新的年轻团队。

words.eng_def: not old; in an early stage of life
a group of people who work together

sentences.en: Their first job is to build a small service area.
sentences.zh: 他们的第一份工作是建造一个小型服务区。

words.eng_def: work that a person does to earn money
to make something by putting parts together
work done for others; help provided

sentences.en: They hold a meeting to make a plan.
sentences.zh: 他们举行会议来制定一个计划。

words.eng_def: to have or organize something like a meeting
an idea or method for doing something in the future

sentences.en: For example, they want to increase the service for local people.
sentences.zh: 例如，他们想为当地居民增加服务。

words.eng_def: a thing that shows what something is like
to make something larger in amount or size
Common English word. (definition needs review)

sentences.en: The result of their work is a big success.
sentences.zh: 他们工作的结果是一个巨大的成功。

words.eng_def: what happens because of something else
Common English word. (definition needs review)

sentences.en: However, one fact is against their idea at first.
sentences.zh: 然而，有一个事实起初反对他们的想法。

words.eng_def: used to introduce a different or opposite idea

in opposition to something

sentences.en: They believe in their plan though.
sentences.zh: 尽管如此，他们相信自己的计划。

words.eng_def: to think that something is true or right
used to add a fact that is surprising or different

sentences.zh: 是的，他们热爱他们的工作。

words.eng_def: a word used to show agreement or a positive answer
to like something very much; to have strong feelings for

sentences.en: The close team offers a second program.
sentences.zh: 这个亲密的团队提供了第二个项目。

words.eng_def: near in distance or relationship
to say that you will give or do something
coming after the first in order or time
a plan or set of activities

sentences.zh: 这发生在远离城市区域的地方。

quiz.question_en: Which word means 'to make something by putting parts together'?
What is the Chinese meaning of 'plan'?
Which word means 'used to add a fact that is surprising or different'?
What is the English definition of 'happen'?
options: B. to take place or occur
C. to think something is true

quiz.question_en: Which word means 'in opposition to something'?

image_prompts: A group of young people smiling and standing together in a bright room.
A small building under construction with a sign 'Service Area'.
People sitting around a table with papers and a whiteboard showing a plan.
A chart showing an increase in service with happy local people.
A big red ribbon and a sign 'Success' with a smiling team.
A person frowning at a paper with a red cross, showing disagreement.
A team member pointing at a plan with a confident expression.
A person nodding and smiling with a heart symbol near them.
A close group of people holding hands, with a second program poster on the wall.
A quiet countryside area with a small building and trees in the distance.
